steps: Open your Nike account order details page.
Locate the order and review whether it is still in a cancellable state.
Use Nike chat or phone support if the self-service cancellation option is unavailable.
notes: Nike does not always expose direct self-service cancellation after fulfillment begins.

steps: Open your Sephora order history page.
Check whether the order shows a cancel option.
If the order is already processing, contact Sephora support immediately.
notes: Orders often move to processing quickly, so cancellation windows may be short.
